title: Xtra Creamy Italian Cheese Risotto
description: A low-calorie Italian risotto dish featuring pecorino-romano cheese and nuka-pickle, served in a copper mug.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large copper mug over medium heat.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed.
Add 1 cup of vegetable broth and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed.
Repeat the previous step, adding the broth in 1 cup increments, until the rice is cooked and creamy.
Stir in the grated pecorino-romano cheese and chopped nuka-pickle.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the risotto hot, garnished with additional cheese and pickle if desired.
